use std::sync::Mutex;

fn process_data(data: &mut Vec<u64>, lock: &Mutex<Vec<u64>>) {
    let guard = lock.lock().unwrap();
    let mut sorted = guard.clone();
    sorted.sort_unstable();
    let sum: u64 = sorted.iter().sum();
    data.push(sum);
    let serialized = serde_json::to_string(&sorted).unwrap();
    println!("{}", serialized);
}
